MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Take Deposition of Jerry Rampelberg After Discovery Cut-Off and To Shorten Time for Consumer Records Notice, granted in part, to wit: discovery shall be reopened until July 25, 2007, to permit taking the deposition of Jerry Rampelberg; time for consumer records notice in connection with the deposition of Jerry Rampelberg shortened to five days. Discovery remains closed for all other purposes. COMM. PAUL SLAVIT
